sqlMap.select: select * from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey NameOfInstitution Location NatureOfLegalService FromDate ToDate LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #NameOfInstitution# #Location# #NatureOfLegalService# #FromDate# #ToDate# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey, NameOfInstitution, Location, NatureOfLegalService, FromDate, ToDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey = #ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW set
NameOfInstitution = #NameOfInstitution# NameOfInstitution = null Location = #Location# Location = null NatureOfLegalService = #NatureOfLegalService# NatureOfLegalService = null FromDate = #FromDate# FromDate = null ToDate = #ToDate# ToDate = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey = #ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey = #ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey, NameOfInstitution, Location, NatureOfLegalService, FromDate, ToDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey = #ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ApplSecurityIssForSavingsKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, NameOfInstitution, Location, NatureOfLegalService, FromDate, ToDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from ApplSecurityIssForSavingsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
